race.comment: PINITO (2) bounced off her good first-up fourth, with a fast finishing victory over 1600m in the G3 Aspiration Quality at Randwick. McDonald sticks, and will be even stronger over this trip. Wide gate no concern and adept in all conditions. QUIETNESS (5) meets Pinto better at the weights after her tough first-up sixth in the G3 Aspiration Quality at Randwick. Good second-up contender expected to figure prominently. MOVIN OUT (6) surprise first-up winner, then got out late with a sound fourth in the G3 Aspiration Quality. Looking for the trip and can test her stablemate. POLYMNIA (7) frustrating mare who indicated she was near he top after warming up late to secure third in the G3 Aspiration. Gets a better set-up for this and not without solid each way prospects. SUN GIFT (10) comes up from Victoria in peak form after finishing second to Magnaspin in the LR Vic Cup at Caulfield over 2000m.
